title: S.O. 689 (E) The Provisions of the Khadi and Village Industries Commission (Amendment) Act, 2006 shall come into force from 15th May, 2006.

V,-60011/11/2004-~~] V,.'tfT. -m(t,.~ 1438 (j1/2006 --- MINISTRY OF AGRO AND RURAL INDUSTRIFS N()TIFICATION NewDelhi, the 12thMay, 2006 S.O. 689(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (2) of Section I of the Khadi and Village Industries Commission (Amendment) Act, 2006 (10 of.2006), the Central Govemmenthereby appoints the 15th May, 2006 as thedate on which the provisions of the said Act shall come into force.
